title: James' Currency
body:
Ever wanted a simple server sided mod that lets you have capitalism in your world? You're in luck! This mod gives you random amount of money every time you kill a mob. The more health the mob has, the more money you get!

Want to buy something off your friend but don't have resources? Simply do `/pay (player) (amount)`!
Check your balance easily with `/balance` or `/bal`  for short!
Of course we didn't forget about the server admins! They have the `/jcurrency` command, which lets people with OP manage the servers monetary situation.
